services.title: Full Stack Website Development
services.description: End-to-end development of scalable web applications from modern frontend interfaces to robust backend systems, built for performance, security, and long-term growth.
services.detailed_description: I architect and build complete web applications from the ground up handling everything from database schema design and server-side business logic to pixel-perfect frontend interfaces. Every project is engineered with clean code architecture, security best practices, and deployment-ready infrastructure in mind so your product is production-ready from day one, not after a second round of fixes.
services_included: Custom web application development frontend and backend
Single Page Applications (SPA) with server-side rendering where needed
Multi-tenant architecture for platforms serving multiple organisations
Role-based access control and secure authentication systems
Database design, modelling, and query optimisation
Admin panel development for content and user management
Automated testing and quality assurance
CI/CD pipeline setup and version control workflows
Post-launch maintenance and feature development
benefits: One engineer owning the full stack means fewer handoff gaps and faster delivery
Battle-tested, enterprise-grade technology used in production by thousands of companies worldwide
Clean, documented code that your next developer can maintain without a full rewrite
Built for growth architecture decisions made with scale in mind from day one
Agile delivery with incremental demos so you always know what has shipped
use_cases: A startup needing an MVP launched in 6–8 weeks with a clean API for a future mobile app
A business replacing a legacy system with a modern, maintainable web application
An agency needing a white-label platform deployable across multiple clients
A company requiring a multi-tenant application with per-client billing and isolated data
problems_solved: Slow, unmaintainable codebases that developers are afraid to touch
Disconnected frontend and backend teams causing integration delays
Scaling bottlenecks when traffic or data volume grows unexpectedly
Security vulnerabilities from poorly structured authentication and data handling
Missed deadlines from unclear requirements and no iterative delivery process

process.title: Discovery & scoping
process.description: Requirements gathering, technical audit of existing systems if applicable, and a written specification with acceptance criteria.

process.title: Architecture & design
process.description: Database schema, API contracts, component structure, and infrastructure decisions documented before a line of code is written.

process.title: Agile development
process.description: Two-week sprints with working demos at the end of each cycle. You see progress, not promises.

process.title: Testing & QA
process.description: Automated tests, manual QA, and cross-browser validation before any release.

process.title: Deployment & handover
process.description: Production deployment, environment configuration, documentation, and a handover session.

deliverables: Fully functional web application with documented codebase
Admin panel for content and user management
outcomes: A production-ready application shipped on time and within scope
Codebase your team can maintain, extend, and hand off to new developers
Measurable performance benchmarks met load time, uptime, and response time
Reduced operational overhead through automation and clean architecture
A clear technical foundation to build your next feature on

services.title: Mobile App Development
services.description: Cross-platform mobile applications with strong backend support delivering smooth, responsive user experiences across iOS and Android from a single codebase.
services.detailed_description: I build cross-platform mobile applications that run natively on both iOS and Android from a single codebase meaning faster delivery, lower maintenance cost, and a consistent experience for your users on every device. Every mobile app is connected to a robust backend, designed with offline capability, push notifications, and app store deployment in mind from day one.
services_included: Cross-platform iOS and Android app development
Mobile UI implementation with platform-specific design conventions
Backend API integration new or existing
Push notifications and in-app messaging
Offline mode and local data synchronisation
In-app payments and subscription management
Social login and secure authentication
Location-based features and map integration
App Store and Google Play submission and deployment
benefits: One codebase for iOS and Android 30–50% faster to build and significantly cheaper to maintain
Near-native performance delivering a smooth, responsive experience users expect
Seamlessly connected to your existing web backend no duplicate business logic
Built to App Store and Play Store guidelines from day one no last-minute rejections
Consistent user experience across all devices and screen sizes
use_cases: A startup wanting a mobile app that shares a backend with their existing web platform
An e-commerce business needing a mobile storefront with push notifications and in-app checkout
A service provider building an on-demand booking app for customers and a separate app for field staff
An enterprise replacing paper-based or desktop-only workflows with a mobile-first tool
problems_solved: High cost and complexity of maintaining separate iOS and Android native codebases
Mobile app quality and performance that does not match the web product
App store rejections due to guideline violations caught too late in development
Poor offline experience causing user frustration in low-connectivity environments
Users seeing different data on mobile versus web because the systems are not in sync

process.title: Scope & platform decision
process.description: Define features, target platforms, and framework approach based on project requirements and timeline.

process.title: UI implementation
process.description: Build screens using platform-appropriate components iOS and Android design conventions respected throughout.

process.title: Backend integration
process.description: Connect to APIs, configure authentication, set up push notifications and data sync.

process.title: Device testing
process.description: Test on real devices across multiple OS versions and screen sizes not just simulators.

process.title: Store submission
process.description: Prepare app store assets, privacy policies, and submit to App Store and Google Play on your behalf.

deliverables: Fully functional iOS and Android application
App Store and Google Play listings with screenshots and descriptions
outcomes: Live app available to users on both major platforms simultaneously
Single codebase that reduces future update and maintenance cost by up to 50%
Higher user engagement through push notifications and offline capability
A mobile presence that matches the quality of your web product
Clear upgrade path for adding new features incrementally

services.title: E-commerce Development
services.description: Custom e-commerce solutions built for conversions and performance including WooCommerce and Shopify stores with product management, secure payment integration, and scalable storefront architecture.

Whether you need a feature-rich online store, a fully bespoke marketplace, or a platform migration, I handle the complete build from storefront design to payment gateway integration, inventory management, and post-launch support. Every store is optimised for speed, mobile experience, and search engine visibility from the start.

Product catalogue management and bulk import tools
Payment gateway integration local and international options
Multi-currency and multi-language storefront support
Abandoned cart recovery and email automation
Inventory and order management systems
Customer account portals and loyalty programmes
Platform migration moving from one e-commerce solution to another

services.title: Cloud & DevOps (AWS)
services.description: Deployment, server configuration, and cloud infrastructure on AWS ensuring your applications are secure, scalable, and highly available.
services.detailed_description: I configure and manage production cloud infrastructure that your application needs to be secure, performant, and resilient. From initial server setup and SSL configuration to asset storage pipelines and serverless functions, I handle the infrastructure layer so your team can focus on shipping features. I also implement automated deployment pipelines, monitoring, and backup strategies giving you confidence that your production environment can handle real-world demands.
services_included: Cloud server provisioning and configuration
Web server setup and optimisation
SSL certificate setup and auto-renewal
Cloud storage setup for files and static asset delivery
Serverless function development and deployment
Content Delivery Network (CDN) configuration for global performance
Managed database setup and configuration
Automated deployment pipeline setup
Server monitoring, alerting, and automated backups
benefits: Enterprise-grade cloud infrastructure used by millions of businesses globally reliable and well-documented
Pay-as-you-scale pricing no over-provisioning for traffic you do not have yet
Automated deployments reduce human error and make releasing new versions a routine non-event
CDN delivers assets faster to users globally without adding load to your application server
Monitoring and alerting means you know about problems before your users do
use_cases: A web application that needs a production-grade server setup with zero-downtime deployments
A media platform needing scalable storage and global CDN delivery for fast image or video serving
A product that needs serverless background processing for tasks that should not block the main application
An application on shared hosting that needs migrating to a dedicated cloud environment
problems_solved: Applications going down under traffic spikes because of under-configured or shared hosting
Security vulnerabilities from misconfigured servers, open ports, and missing SSL
Slow asset delivery because files are served directly from the application server

No visibility into server health, error rates, or response times until users complain

process.title: Infrastructure audit
process.description: Review current setup or define requirements from scratch compute, storage, database, and networking.

process.title: Application deployment
process.description: Deploy the application, configure environment variables, set up domain and SSL.

process.title: Deployment pipeline
process.description: Automate deployments via a CI/CD pipeline push to the main branch, deploy to production reliably.

process.description: Set up uptime monitoring, error alerting, automated backups, and hand over access and documentation.

deliverables: Configured cloud environment with all required services

outcomes: Production environment that handles traffic spikes without downtime
Zero-downtime deployments releasing code is no longer a high-stress event

services.title: SEO & Performance Optimisation
services.description: On-page SEO implementation, Core Web Vitals tuning, database query optimisation, and caching strategy so your product loads faster, ranks higher, and scales cleanly.
services.detailed_description: I approach SEO and performance as an engineering problem, not a checklist exercise. Fast load times, clean HTML structure, proper metadata and structured data, and a well-indexed site architecture are the foundations of sustainable organic search performance. I diagnose and fix Core Web Vitals failures, implement server-side caching, optimise slow database queries, and ensure your application performs under load because a site that loads in one second converts measurably better than one that loads in three.
services_included: Core Web Vitals audit and remediation LCP, INP, and CLS
On-page SEO implementation meta tags, canonical URLs, Open Graph, structured data
XML sitemap generation and Google Search Console setup
Page speed optimisation image compression, lazy loading, code minification, asset bundling
Server-side caching implementation
Database query optimisation and indexing strategy
Technical SEO audit crawl errors, redirect chains, duplicate content, broken links
Content SEO guidelines and keyword implementation review
Performance monitoring setup and ongoing benchmarking
benefits: Faster load times directly correlate with higher conversion rates every second of improvement matters
Google ranks fast, well-structured sites higher performance is a direct SEO advantage
Structured data and proper metadata improve click-through rates from search results
Database and caching optimisation reduce server load and hosting costs under scale
One-time technical improvements compound over time unlike paid advertising spend
use_cases: An online store with a poor performance score losing rankings to faster competitors
A content site with thousands of pages needing technical SEO cleanup and structured data
A web application with slow database queries causing timeouts under moderate traffic
A new website needing a complete SEO and performance foundation set up before launch
problems_solved: Poor Core Web Vitals scores causing ranking penalties in Google Search
Slow database queries timing out under normal traffic loads
Unindexed pages, crawl errors, and duplicate content diluting search authority
Unoptimised images and assets destroying load time on mobile devices
No caching strategy means every page request hits the database and server fresh

process.title: Audit
process.description: Full technical SEO and performance audit using industry-standard tools and database profiling.

process.title: Prioritisation
process.description: Rank issues by impact fix the problems that move metrics the most, first.

process.title: Technical fixes
process.description: Implement caching, optimise queries, fix crawl errors, compress assets, and resolve Core Web Vitals issues.

process.title: On-page SEO
process.description: Implement structured data, meta tags, canonical URLs, sitemap, and Search Console configuration.

process.title: Reporting
process.description: Deliver before/after performance benchmarks and a monitoring setup to track improvements over time.

deliverables: Technical SEO and performance audit report with prioritised fix list
Core Web Vitals improvement with benchmarks documented
Structured data and on-page SEO implementation
outcomes: Measurable improvement in Core Web Vitals documented before and after
Higher organic search rankings driven by improved technical SEO signals
Reduced server load and infrastructure cost through caching
Faster pages with higher engagement, lower bounce rates, and better conversions
A clean technical foundation that future content and SEO efforts can build on

services.title: API Development & Integration
services.description: Design and integration of RESTful APIs enabling seamless communication between systems, third-party services, and web or mobile applications.
services.detailed_description: I design, build, and integrate APIs that connect your systems cleanly and reliably. Whether you need a backend API to power your mobile app, webhooks to sync data between platforms, or integration with third-party services, I architect the data contracts and write the integration code that works in production and keeps working when external services update. Every API I build is versioned, documented, and secured from the start.
services_included: RESTful API design and development
API versioning and backward-compatible upgrade strategy
Authentication and authorisation tokens, OAuth2, API keys
Webhook development and inbound webhook handling
Third-party API integration payment gateways, CRMs, logistics, and more
API rate limiting, throttling, and abuse prevention
API documentation collections and specification files
Automated API testing and contract testing
GraphQL API development for flexible data querying
benefits: Well-designed APIs let your web app, mobile app, and partners all share one trusted source of truth
Versioned APIs mean you can update your backend without breaking existing integrations
Documented APIs reduce onboarding time for every future developer significantly
Proper authentication means your data is only accessible to systems that should have it
Webhook-driven integrations reduce polling overhead and keep data in sync in near real-time
use_cases: A mobile app that needs a secure, well-structured backend API to power its features
An e-commerce platform integrating with a payment gateway, shipping provider, and CRM simultaneously
A platform that needs to expose a public API so enterprise clients can build their own integrations
A business replacing manual data entry by syncing two internal systems via webhooks automatically
problems_solved: Brittle integrations that break every time a third-party API changes its response format
Unsecured endpoints exposing sensitive data without proper authentication
No API documentation, making it impossible to onboard new developers or build a mobile client
Duplicate data across systems because there is no reliable synchronisation mechanism
Slow API responses caused by inefficient queries and missing data optimisation

process.title: API design
process.description: Define resource structure, endpoints, request and response contracts, and authentication strategy before writing code.

process.title: Development
process.description: Build endpoints with proper error handling, validation, rate limiting, and logging.

process.title: Third-party integration
process.description: Connect to external services, handle webhooks, and build retry logic for reliability.

process.title: Testing
process.description: Automated API tests, edge case validation, and load testing for high-traffic endpoints.

process.title: Documentation & handover
process.description: Full API documentation delivered alongside the codebase.

deliverables: Third-party integration code with error handling and logging
outcomes: A reliable API that your mobile app, web frontend, and partners can all depend on
Reduced manual data entry through automated system-to-system sync
Secure data access with proper authentication no more exposed endpoints
Documentation that cuts new developer onboarding time significantly
A foundation for building a partner ecosystem or public-facing API offering

services.title: Frontend Engineering
services.description: Responsive, accessible interfaces built with modern frameworks performant from the first load and wired cleanly to any backend or third-party API.
services.detailed_description: I build frontend interfaces that are fast, accessible, and a pleasure to use and that stay maintainable as your product grows. Using component-driven architecture, utility-first styling, and modern tooling, I deliver frontends that perform on every device, integrate cleanly with any backend API, and follow accessibility standards from day one. Server-driven reactive UI for dynamic, real-time interfaces
Responsive design across mobile, tablet, and desktop

Component library that speeds up every future feature addition

services.title: WebSocket & Real-Time Features
services.description: Live notifications, real-time data feeds, and event-driven systems keeping your users connected and your data always current without page refreshes.
services.detailed_description: I implement real-time features that transform static applications into live, responsive experiences. Using event-driven architecture and WebSocket technology, I build systems that push data to connected users the moment it changes without polling, without page refreshes, and without complexity for the end user. From live notifications and chat to real-time dashboards and collaborative tools, I design and build the complete real-time feature stack.
services_included: Real-time notification systems in-app and push
Live data dashboards with auto-updating charts and tables
Chat and messaging features
Presence channels who is currently online or viewing
Real-time collaborative editing and form synchronisation
WebSocket connection management, reconnection, and fallback handling
Event-driven background processing with queues
Real-time order and status tracking
Live inventory and availability updates
benefits: Real-time updates eliminate the need for users to refresh better experience and higher engagement
WebSocket is dramatically more efficient than polling fewer server requests, lower infrastructure cost
Self-hosted real-time solutions remove third-party dependency and per-message pricing
Event-driven architecture decouples the system adding a new real-time feature does not require rewriting existing code
Presence awareness lets you build collaborative features showing who is online or viewing the same record
use_cases: A platform where multiple users edit shared data and need to see each other's changes in real time
A logistics dashboard showing live vehicle positions and delivery statuses without page refresh
A support tool where agents and customers exchange messages in a real-time chat interface
An e-commerce site showing live stock levels on product pages to create urgency and reduce overselling
problems_solved: Users working on stale data because the page was loaded minutes ago and nothing has updated
High server load from constant polling hundreds of clients requesting fresh data every few seconds
Real-time features that work in demos but fail under concurrent production users
Notification systems that deliver alerts minutes after the triggering event occurred
Collaborative tools where users overwrite each other's work because there is no live awareness

process.title: Event architecture
process.description: Define which events need to broadcast, to which channels, and to which users before writing any real-time code.

process.title: Server setup
process.description: Configure the WebSocket server and set up broadcast channels with proper authentication.

process.title: Event implementation
process.description: Implement events, listeners, and broadcast conditions on the backend.

process.title: Frontend integration
process.description: Connect the client-side listener and update the UI reactively when events arrive.

process.title: Load testing
process.description: Test with concurrent connections to validate performance under realistic usage conditions.

deliverables: Real-time UI components notifications, live data tables, chat
outcomes: Users see data updates the moment they happen no refresh required
Reduced server load compared to polling-based approaches
Higher engagement through live notifications and collaborative features
Reliable real-time features that hold up under concurrent users
Event-driven foundation that makes future real-time features fast to add

services.title: AI-Enhanced Development
services.description: From embedding intelligent features chat, summarisation, classification into your product, to automating workflows and business logic using AI. Faster delivery, smarter systems, less manual overhead.
services.detailed_description: I integrate AI capabilities into web and mobile products at two levels. The first is product-level: embedding intelligent features conversational interfaces, document summarisation, content classification, automated data extraction directly into your application. The second is workflow-level: using AI to accelerate development, automate business logic, and reduce the manual overhead that slows teams down. Both compound over time better products, built faster.
services_included: AI-powered chat and conversational interface development
Document and content summarisation features
Text classification, tagging, and content moderation
AI-assisted data extraction from unstructured content
Intelligent search semantic and natural language queries
Prompt engineering and system design for reliable AI outputs
Knowledge base integration for AI-powered Q&A features
AI workflow automation for internal business processes
AI usage monitoring and cost management
benefits: AI features differentiate your product in a market where basic functionality is commoditised
Intelligent APIs abstract the complexity of machine learning you get the capability without building models
AI-assisted development accelerates delivery features that would take weeks are scoped and built faster
Automated classification and extraction reduces manual data entry and human error at scale
Knowledge base-powered features let your product answer questions using your own proprietary content
use_cases: A platform that needs an intelligent assistant to summarise history and suggest next actions
A document-heavy application that needs to automatically extract key information from uploads
A support helpdesk adding an intelligent first-response layer that resolves common queries without human involvement
A catalogue or content site adding semantic search so users find results by describing what they need
problems_solved: Repetitive manual tasks classification, tagging, data entry consuming team time that could be automated
Search that only works if the user knows the exact name or identifier to look for
Support volume that scales with user growth and cannot be handled by a fixed-size team
Development cycles slowed by boilerplate and repetitive implementation work
Proprietary knowledge locked in documents and databases that users cannot query conversationally

process.title: AI feature scoping
process.description: Define the specific problem AI should solve and choose the right approach chat, classification, extraction, search, or automation.

process.title: Prompt engineering
process.description: Design and test prompt structures to get reliable, accurate, and consistent outputs.

process.title: Integration
process.description: Build the AI feature into your application with proper authentication, error handling, and cost controls.

process.title: Testing & evaluation
process.description: Test across edge cases, measure accuracy, and tune for production reliability.

process.title: Deployment & monitoring
process.description: Deploy with usage monitoring and cost alerts AI features need visibility on usage and spend.

deliverables: AI feature integration production-ready with error handling and retry logic
Prompt library and system design documentation
AI feature UI chat interface, classification output, extraction results
Cost monitoring and usage alerts setup
Documentation for extending and maintaining the AI integration
outcomes: Intelligent features live in your product that users can interact with immediately
Measurable reduction in manual tasks through automation
Faster development velocity through AI-assisted tooling
A competitive product differentiator that non-technical competitors cannot easily replicate
Clear understanding of AI feature costs with monitoring to prevent unexpected billing

services.title: Custom CMS Development
services.description: Purpose-built content management systems designed around your editorial workflow not the other way around. Clean interfaces, structured data, and APIs your team will enjoy working with.
services.detailed_description: Off-the-shelf CMS platforms force your editorial workflow to fit their data model. I build custom content management systems designed around exactly how your team works the content types you have, the approval workflows you need, the APIs your frontend consumes, and the permissions model that matches your organisation. Whether you need a headless CMS powering a modern frontend, a full-stack platform with its own editorial UI, or a tailored admin interface with a powerful content API, I build it to fit.
services_included: Custom CMS with tailored content types and data schemas
Intuitive admin panel designed for editorial teams
Headless CMS with REST or GraphQL API for frontend consumption
Multi-role editorial workflow draft, review, publish, schedule
Media library and asset management
Content versioning and revision history
Multi-language and multi-region content management
Dynamic form builder and custom field types
Content performance analytics and reporting dashboards
benefits: Content types, fields, and workflows built exactly for your data no workarounds or forced compromises
Headless architecture means your content powers any channel web, mobile, kiosk, or all three
Fine-grained permissions give editors, reviewers, admins, and read-only users exactly the access they need
Scheduled publishing, versioning, and revision history give editorial teams confidence and control
API-first design means any future frontend or integration can consume your content without rebuilding the CMS
use_cases: A government department publishing structured data that standard CMS platforms cannot model cleanly
A media company needing a custom editorial workflow with multi-stage approval before content goes live
A platform that needs an embedded CMS so its own users can manage content within the product
An organisation managing events, members, and communications through one unified custom admin interface
problems_solved: Standard CMS platforms that cannot model your content types without heavy customisation and compromise
Editorial teams blocked by developers for every content update because the CMS is not built for their workflow
Content that needs to power multiple channels but currently has to be duplicated and managed separately
No approval workflow content goes live immediately without review, causing quality and compliance issues
Slow admin interfaces caused by unoptimised queries and bloated plugins on large content databases

process.title: Content modelling
process.description: Map all content types, fields, relationships, and workflow states before any development begins.

process.title: Schema & API design
process.description: Design the data schema and API contracts the editorial interface and frontend will consume.

process.title: Admin panel development
process.description: Build the editorial interface intuitive, fast, and role-aware for each type of user.

process.title: Content delivery API
process.description: Build the content API with filtering, pagination, search, and caching.

process.title: Training & launch
process.description: Train the editorial team, document the content model, and support the go-live.

deliverables: Custom CMS with documented content types and schemas
Admin panel configured for your editorial team
Content migration from previous system if applicable
outcomes: Editorial team publishing and managing content independently no developer bottleneck
Structured content that can power any current or future frontend channel
Approval workflows that prevent unreviewed content from going live
A CMS that is fast, intuitive, and built around how your team actually works
An API foundation that makes future integrations and new channel additions straightforward

services.title: Database Design & Optimisation
services.description: Scalable relational schema design, query optimisation, and indexing strategy built to handle growth without performance degradation.
services.detailed_description: A poorly designed database is the most common reason web applications become slow and expensive to change. I design relational schemas that are structured correctly, indexed appropriately, and built so your most frequent queries are fast from day one. For existing applications, I audit slow queries, identify missing indexes, fix inefficient data retrieval patterns, and implement caching layers delivering measurable performance improvements without requiring a full application rewrite.
services_included: Relational database schema design for new applications
Data normalisation and integrity enforcement
Indexing strategy composite, covering, and partial indexes
Query optimisation and ORM performance tuning
Inefficient data retrieval detection and resolution
Database caching for frequently accessed, rarely changing data
Migration planning and zero-downtime migration execution
Slow query analysis and execution plan interpretation
Advanced database features full-text search, partitioning, JSONB
industries: Any application with large or rapidly growing datasets
benefits: A well-indexed schema means queries stay fast as your data grows from thousands to millions of rows
Fixing inefficient retrieval patterns can reduce page load times by 50–90% without changing business logic
Caching eliminates repeat database reads for frequently accessed, rarely changing data
Correct normalisation prevents data inconsistencies and reduces the risk of bugs from stale or duplicated data
Zero-downtime migration strategies let you change the schema without taking your application offline
use_cases: A platform whose database queries are getting slower as the customer count and data volume grow
An analytics application running complex aggregation queries that time out under normal usage
A new application that needs a database schema designed correctly before the first line of business logic is written
An existing system needing performance improvements without a full application rewrite
problems_solved: Application pages timing out because a single poorly optimised query is scanning the entire table
Data inconsistencies caused by schemas that store the same information in multiple places
Database becoming the bottleneck CPU and memory spiking under moderate traffic
No migration strategy means schema changes require taking the application offline
Reports and dashboards taking minutes to load because aggregation queries have no caching

process.title: Audit
process.description: Analyse slow query logs, run execution plans on the worst-performing queries, and map the current schema structure.

process.title: Diagnosis
process.description: Identify inefficient retrieval patterns, missing indexes, normalisation issues, and caching opportunities.

process.title: Optimisation
process.description: Add indexes, rewrite queries, resolve inefficient patterns, implement caching where appropriate.

process.title: Schema redesign if needed
process.description: Design and execute schema migrations with zero-downtime strategies for production systems.

process.title: Benchmarking & documentation
process.description: Before-and-after query execution time benchmarks, index documentation, and caching layer documentation.

deliverables: Database audit report with prioritised improvement recommendations
Optimised queries and reusable data access patterns
Migration files for any schema changes
outcomes: Measurably faster queries execution times documented before and after
Application that stays performant as data volume grows not just today
Reduced database server load less compute needed for the same traffic
Data integrity enforced at the schema level fewer bugs from inconsistent data
A development team that understands the schema and can extend it confidently

services.title: Third-Party Integrations
services.description: Connecting your product to the tools your business runs on payment gateways, CRMs, marketing platforms, analytics, and more. Clean, maintainable integration code that holds up when external APIs change.
services.detailed_description: Modern products do not operate in isolation they need to communicate with payment processors, CRMs, shipping providers, marketing tools, analytics platforms, and more. I design and build integration layers that are resilient, well-logged, and maintainable. Every integration is structured so that when an external API updates or you decide to switch providers, you change as little of your codebase as possible not dozens of files.
services_included: Payment gateway integration local and international options
CRM integration bidirectional data sync and lead management
Email and marketing platform integration
Shipping and logistics provider integration
SMS and communication platform integration
Google services integration Maps, Analytics, OAuth
Social media platform integration
Accounting software integration
Webhook development and inbound event processing
benefits: Architecture that isolates third-party dependencies switching providers requires minimal code change
Centralised integration logging makes debugging production issues fast and straightforward
Webhook handling with retry logic and idempotency prevents duplicate or missed event processing
Clean integration layer reduces onboarding time for developers who need to understand external dependencies
Graceful degradation means your application handles third-party outages without complete failure
use_cases: A platform integrating a payment gateway, shipping provider, and email tool as part of a single order workflow
A CRM syncing leads and contacts with an external sales platform bidirectionally via webhooks
A healthcare application integrating SMS reminders, video consultations, and online payments
A marketplace needing map-based search, behaviour analytics, and social login all working together
problems_solved: Integration code scattered across the application impossible to update when the external API changes
No retry logic on webhook endpoints missed events that are silently never processed
Payment integration that works in testing but has edge cases that fail silently in production
No logging on integration calls impossible to diagnose why an order was not fulfilled or a notification not sent
Tight coupling to one provider switching requires changes across dozens of files

process.title: Integration mapping
process.description: Map all required integrations, data flows, and event triggers before writing any code.

process.title: Architecture design
process.description: Design the integration structure to isolate each external dependency cleanly.

process.title: Implementation
process.description: Build each integration with proper authentication, error handling, retry logic, and logging.

process.title: Testing
process.description: Test in sandbox or test mode, validate edge cases failed payments, webhook retries, rate limits.

process.title: Documentation & monitoring
process.description: Document each integration and set up alerting for integration failures in production.

deliverables: Integration layer for each third-party service
Webhook endpoint implementation with signature validation and retry handling
Logging and monitoring for each integration
Error handling and graceful degradation implementation
outcomes: All business-critical systems connected and exchanging data reliably
Integration failures surfaced immediately via alerts not discovered by users
Clean architecture that makes future provider switches a minimal-effort change
Reduced manual data entry through automated system-to-system synchronisation
Confidence that payments, notifications, and data sync all work correctly in production

services.title: Tech Consulting & Rescue
services.description: Auditing stuck or legacy projects, untangling technical debt, and unblocking delivery honest assessment, clear priorities, and hands-on fixes.
services.detailed_description: I work with teams that are stuck applications that have grown too complex to change safely, projects behind schedule, codebases left without documentation, or early technical decisions now causing problems at scale. I audit the situation honestly, prioritise the highest-impact improvements, and either fix them hands-on or give your team a clear, actionable plan to execute themselves. No inflated reports, no recommendations designed to create more consulting work just an accurate diagnosis and a practical path forward.
services_included: Full technical audit of existing codebase, architecture, and infrastructure
Technical debt assessment and prioritised remediation roadmap
Performance bottleneck diagnosis application, database, and server
Security vulnerability audit and remediation plan
Code and architecture review for in-progress projects
Legacy application rescue and modernisation planning
Team unblocking fixing the specific issue stopping delivery
Technology evaluation and migration planning
Developer onboarding documentation for undocumented codebases
industries: Companies Preparing for Investment or Acquisition
Any Team Whose Application Has Become Hard to Change
Projects That Have Gone Over Time and Budget
benefits: An outside perspective surfaces problems the team is too close to see or too cautious to say out loud
A prioritised roadmap means you fix the right things first, not just the most visible symptoms
Hands-on fixes deliver immediate relief not just a report that sits unread
Honest assessment with no interest in recommending a full rewrite if a targeted fix will do
Documentation deliverable means your team can maintain the codebase long after the engagement ends
use_cases: A product that has become slow and unmaintainable as the team has grown and features have been bolted on
An agency that has inherited a client codebase with no documentation and a deadline approaching
A business whose original developer has left and the replacement team cannot understand the application
A company whose web presence has accumulated years of technical debt and security vulnerabilities
problems_solved: No one on the team understands how the whole system works critical knowledge walked out with a departing developer
Every new feature takes far longer than it should because the existing code resists change
Application is slow but no one knows exactly why no monitoring, no profiling, no baseline to measure from
Security vulnerabilities identified but the team does not know how to prioritise or safely address them
Project is behind schedule and the team needs someone to diagnose why and help recover the timeline

process.title: Rapid assessment
process.description: Review the codebase, architecture, deployment environment, and any existing documentation. Identify the highest-risk areas.

process.title: Findings report
process.description: Deliver a written report with a clear diagnosis, prioritised issues, and specific recommendations.

process.title: Remediation planning
process.description: Define a phased plan to address the highest-impact issues first without requiring a full rewrite.

process.title: Hands-on fixes
process.description: Implement agreed fixes directly performance improvements, security hardening, documentation, targeted refactoring.

process.title: Handover
process.description: Transfer knowledge to the internal team with documentation, walkthroughs, and a clear maintenance guide.

deliverables: Technical audit report with prioritised findings and recommendations
Hands-on fixes for the agreed highest-priority issues
Codebase documentation architecture overview, setup guide, key decisions
Performance benchmarks before and after remediation
outcomes: Team unblocked able to develop and deploy with confidence again
Clear understanding of what the application does and how no more single-point-of-knowledge risk
Measurable performance improvement on the worst-performing areas
Security vulnerabilities addressed and documented
A prioritised roadmap the team can execute independently without ongoing consultant dependency
